current_release.name: Release 1 — Counter MVP
current_release.goal: Ship the minimum counter service end-to-end through the governed pipeline.

stories.title: GET /count returns current value
stories.narrative: As a platform operator, I want to fetch the current counter value so that I can see the starting state and observe changes over time.
acceptance_criteria: Response arrives in under 300ms in dev
Unit test covers happy path and missing row

stories.title: POST /increment increments and returns new value
stories.narrative: As a platform operator, I want to increment the counter via HTTP so that the frontend can trigger state change.
acceptance_criteria: Two sequential increments return values that differ by exactly 1
Concurrent increments do not lose updates (SQLite transaction)

stories.title: Single-page UI reads and increments
stories.narrative: As a platform operator, I want a UI that shows the counter and has a button to increment so that I can exercise the full stack manually.
acceptance_criteria: UI loads at `/` served by FastAPI static
Counter value rendered on page load
`+1` button calls POST /increment and updates the display
Error toast appears on network failure; button re-enables
Meets WCAG AA keyboard navigation and ARIA
